acquisition method: operated in positive DDA top 20 mode
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 100 μL 0.05 M iodoacetamide solution
enrichment method: isolated from soluble fraction by MC1 antibody immunoaffinity columns
fractionation method: sarkosyl fractionation was performed as previously described
instrument: analyzed using a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: mounted directly at the inlet to the HF mass spectrometer
labeling: label-free quantification was done using the XIC-based in-built label-free quantification
